title: The Silent Lifeboat
tagline: A mission survived. One name disappeared from the story.

profile.name: Commander Mara Voss
profile.context: A rescue commander remembers a clean evacuation that the mission logs contradict.

memories.title: Launch manifest
memories.summary: Seven crew boarded the research vessel.
memories.evidence: The signed manifest lists engineer Ilya Soren as crew member seven.

memories.title: Lifeboat telemetry
memories.summary: The escape craft departed with one unused restraint.
memories.evidence: Mass and biometric telemetry show only six occupants at separation.

memories.title: Sealed command recording
memories.summary: A voice orders departure before the final airlock cycle.
memories.evidence: Mara authorizes launch while Ilya's suit beacon is still outside the craft.

memories.title: Memorial transcript
memories.summary: The official memorial names six survivors and no casualty.
memories.evidence: A redaction marker occupies the place where Ilya's name should appear.
